channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A healthier global diet could cut farm emissions by 85%
item.description: A global shift toward healthier diets could sharply reduce livestock farming, free up agricultural land, and cut emissions from land-use change by 85%...

item.title: NASA will test SpaceX and Blue Origin Moon landers before the next lunar landing
item.description: NASA is preparing for future astronaut landings on the Moon with an unusually ambitious orbital rehearsal. During Artemis III in 2027, Orion astronaut...

item.title: Orcas filmed tearing apart a giant sunfish into numerous fragments
item.description: Researchers in the Gulf of California observed a previously undocumented orca behavior. In two separate incidents, an orca seized a ...

item.title: Scientists uncover the neural switch that determines bee roles
item.description: Researchers identified specific brain circuits that influence job assignments as bees age. Disabling these circuits caused older worker bees to...
